prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `1d0a4b61`.
codex_response:
Implemented the new ARC2 task package in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_1d0a4b61/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_1d0a4b61/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_1d0a4b61/generator.py#L1). The rule is: infer the smallest row/column periods consistent with nonzero cells, recover the repeating tile by residue-class voting, and fill the erased `0`s back into the seamless wallpaper. The summary hint was used; it matched the official examples, so I did not add `notes.md`, and no new `dsl_ext` primitive was needed.

The generator is constrained to the official family: fixed `25x25` grids, only the observed period families `(4x2, 6x6, 7x7, 9x9)`, color `1` as the scaffold/frontier color, and overlapping axis-aligned zero rectangles as corruption. `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 1d0a4b61` passed `4/4` official examples, the build produced `1000` examples in [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1d0a4b61/task.json), and `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 1d0a4b61` passed `1000/1000` generated examples. I also sampled built examples from `task.json` to sanity-check that the generated outputs stayed inside those official period families.

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1d0a4b61/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1d0a4b61/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1d0a4b61/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1d0a4b61/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1d0a4b61/previews/preview_03.png).
